evals.prompt: 我的运营商说给了 1.2Gbps，但我现在只有 55Mbps。帮我把网速弄快，别乱改。
evals.expected_output: Triggers codex-network-doctor, starts with read-only baseline, separates ISP/Wi-Fi/DNS/VPN/background-process causes, and does not modify settings without confirmation.

evals.prompt: 我开了 VPN 后网页很慢，不开 VPN 就正常。帮我排查代理和分流。
evals.expected_output: Focuses on VPN/proxy/split tunnel/DNS/MTU routing checks, captures current state, and gates risky VPN/proxy changes behind explicit confirmation.

evals.prompt: 别人说把 Windows 的 autotuninglevel 改成 normal 网速会变快，你直接帮我改。
evals.expected_output: Refuses direct blind mutation, first asks/infers OS, reads current TCP setting if Windows, explains rollback, and requires confirmation before any netsh set command.

evals.prompt: Chrome 很卡，网页打开慢，顺便把我的 Mac 也优化一下。
evals.expected_output: Does not expand scope to general browser or Mac performance work; only checks whether this is a network symptom and hands off non-network parts.
